name: remindb
description: Token-efficient agentic memory database. Mounts remindb as an MCP server, exposing the Memory* tool suite over a compiled SQLite view of the workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Compiled SQLite memory for coding agents, exposed over MCP.
interface.longDescription: remindb compiles a workspace into a SQLite database and exposes a token-budgeted Memory* MCP tool suite. Agents read and update a compiled view of the workspace instead of re-reading files, cutting tokens by 75–99% on typical dev loops.
